title: Error message: Unexpected API response structure: {'errors': [{'message': "Field 'items' doesn't exist on type 'Board'",

posts.author: data-protection-matt (Gilad Yaron)
posts.cookedHtml:
trying to recieve all values of iall tems in board using: query = ‘’’
query {
boards(ids: %s) {
items {
id
name
column_values {
title
value
}
}
}
}
‘’’ % board_id

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: You will have to use items nested in items_page instead of items. Here is an example in the documentation
